title: ternatea biflora
intro: Ternatea biflora, also known as Javanese moonflower or moonflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, sedative, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Ternatea biflora include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and fever, as well as pain relief and reduced inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal properties, and is also used in traditional medicine in certain parts of the world.
